untranslatable_reason: Adam & Eve double bottom pattern detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic (identifying two distinct bottoms with one narrow and one wide, plus measuring their relative widths). This cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and standard comparison operators. Pattern detection would require custom pattern-matching logic beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a classic candlestick pattern that requires identifying: (1) two sequential bottom formations, (2) one with narrow range and one with wide range, (3) upward breakout from the second bottom. The entry condition approximates a breakout above the pivot point (support level). Exit uses RSI overbought condition (70) as a reasonable reversal indicator per rule 8. Volume_trend 'Downward' during pattern formation and 59% throwback frequency are noted in parameters but cannot be enforced with available indicators. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector module.
